summary: RBP App Shell - Complete E2E testing of cross-shell navigation and architecture documentation. All 4 shells (Public, Auth, Portal, Admin) are interconnected with cross-shell links. Shell Navigator bar appears on every page. Architecture Map page documents the entire structure.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for shell preview
context_for_next_testing_agent: All cross-shell navigation features verified. Shell Navigator bar with 4 shell links + rbp_app badge appears on every page. Architecture Map at /architecture shows app owner, flow diagram, shell boundaries, and complete route tree. Cross-shell links tested: My Portal from public header, Back to site/Go to Portal from auth, Back to Website/Admin/Logout from portal sidebar and topbar, Public Site/Member Portal/Logout from admin bar, Desk notice links in admin.

backend_api_tests.health_endpoint: PASS - returns status ok, app rbp_app, version 0.1.0
backend_api_tests.navigation_endpoint: PASS - returns 9 primary nav items and 4 utility items (including My Portal)
backend_api_tests.architecture_endpoint: PASS - returns app_owner, shells, boundaries, routes, frappe_integration

shell_navigator_tests.rbp_app_badge: PASS - rbp_app badge shown on right side
shell_navigator_tests.current_shell_highlighting: PASS - Current shell highlighted correctly on each page
